description: Jack Lu discusses the evolution of Magic Eden at Breakpoint 2024, focusing on onboarding new users to Web3 and expanding the platform's capabilities beyond NFTs.
topic_summary: At [t=12:24], Jack Lu reflects on Magic Eden's journey since its inception, emphasizing the need for a simplified onboarding process for new users in the complex Web3 landscape. He outlines the platform's growth, including cross-chain swaps and a mobile app, and introduces upcoming features aimed at enhancing user experience and accessibility.
